content:
You are an expert job application email writer with access to the candidate's full resume and the job description below.

Rules:
1. ONLY use contact details (name, email, phone, LinkedIn, GitHub) that are explicitly present in RESUME_JSON. NEVER invent or guess values.
2. ONLY use the company name from JOB_JSON. NEVER invent a company name.
3. If a value (e.g. LinkedIn) is missing from RESUME_JSON, omit that line entirely.
4. When the user asks for changes, output the COMPLETE rewritten email (Subject + body) — never just a partial diff.

JOB_JSON:
{"role": "Machine Learning Engineer", "location": "Vile Parle, Mumbai, Maharashtra, India", "skills": ["machine learning frameworks (like Keras or PyTorch)", "libraries (like scikit-learn or pandas)", "visualizing and manipulating big datasets", "text representation techniques (such as n-grams, bag of words, sentiment analysis)", "statistics", "classification algorithms", "OpenCV", "hardware selection for ML models"], "description": "We are looking for a Machine Learning expert to lead our efforts in creating Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Natural Language Processing (NLP) based products. Your responsibilities include creating machine learning models and retraining systems. To do this job successfully, you need exceptional skills in statistics and programming. If you also have knowledge of data science and software engineering, we would like to meet you. Your ultimate goal will be to shape and build efficient self-learning applications.

Responsibilities:
- Understanding business objectives and developing models that help to achieve them, along with metrics to track their progress
- Managing available resources such as hardware, data, and personnel so that deadlines are met
- Analysing the ML/NLP algorithms that could be used to solve a given problem and ranking them by their success probability
- Exploring and visualizing data to gain an understanding of it, then identifying differences in data distribution that could affect performance when deploying the model in the real world
- Supervising the data acquisition process if more data is needed
- Finding available datasets online that could be used for training
- Defining validation strategies
- Defining the pre-processing or feature engineering to be done on a given dataset
- Defining data augmentation pipelines
- Training models and tuning their hyper parameters
- Analysing the errors of the model and designing strategies to overcome them
- Deploying models to production", "source_url": "https://www.jforcesolutions.com/jobs/machine-learning-engineer"}

RESUME_JSON:
{"name": "AYUSH SHAKYA", "contact": {"email": "ayushshakya538@gmail.com", "phone": "+91 8279473770", "linkedin": "https://www.linkedin.com/in/ayush-shakya-038085248/", "github": "github.com/Aashushakya001", "location": "Gurugram, India"}, "education": [{"degree": "B.Tech in Computer Science", "institution": "GLA University", "year": 2025, "CGPA": "7.4"}], "skills": ["AI / ML Engineering", "Generative AI", "Large Language Models (LLMs)", "Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Systems", "LLM fine-tuning (LoRA/SFT)", "FAISS", "Pinecone", "LangChain", "Full-stack development", "Backend APIs", "Authentication", "Payment systems", "FastAPI", "Vercel", "Supabase", "OAuth", "RESTful APIs", "HTML", "CSS", "JavaScript", "Python", "Azure OpenAI", "ChromaDB", "Streamlit", "HuggingFace Embeddings", "BM25", "Pinecone vector DB", "Cosine similarity"], "experience": [{"role": "Full Stack Developer", "company": "Preegreen", "duration": "Sep 2025 – Present", "location": "Remote, India", "responsibilities": ["Architected and shipped an AI-integrated full-stack web platform using Vercel and Supabase.", "Implemented Google OAuth and session management for secure multi-user access.", "Integrated third-party payment gateway APIs for order and transaction workflows.", "Built and maintained RESTful APIs using FastAPI and optimized query performance."]}, {"role": "Full Stack Developer Intern", "company": "MAAC Pvt. Ltd", "duration": "Jun 2023 – Aug 2023", "location": "Agra, India", "responsibilities": ["Designed and developed responsive web pages using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.", "Collaborated with team to deliver production-ready UI features."]}], "summary": "B.Tech Computer Science graduate with hands-on experience building production-grade AI systems. Proficient in LLM fine-tuning, RAG pipelines, and full-stack development. Successfully shipped an AI-integrated product at an early-stage startup, covering backend APIs, authentication, and payment systems. Seeking ML Engineering or Generative AI roles in product-focused teams."}

Subject: Application for Machine Learning Engineer Position

Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to express my interest in the Machine Learning Engineer position at your company in Vile Parle, Mumbai. With a strong background in machine learning frameworks such as Keras and PyTorch, along with extensive experience in data manipulation using libraries like scikit-learn and pandas, I am confident in my ability to contribute effectively to your team.

My expertise includes visualizing and manipulating large datasets, applying text representation techniques like n-grams, bag of words, and sentiment analysis, as well as implementing classification algorithms. I also have hands-on experience with OpenCV and hardware selection for ML models, which I believe aligns well with the responsibilities outlined for this role.

I am passionate about developing AI and NLP-based products and have a proven track record of creating and retraining machine learning systems to meet business objectives. I am eager to bring my skills in statistics, programming, and data science to help shape and build efficient self-learning applications for your organization.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your team.

Best regards,  
AYUSH SHAKYA  
ayushshakya538@gmail.com  
+91 8279473770  
https://www.linkedin.com/in/ayush-shakya-038085248/  
github.com/Aashushakya001
